channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 13 com severidade Alta
• 4 novas CVEs
• 5 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

💣 Hackers Exploit Critical NGINX RCE Vulnerability in the Wild - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Nginx, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9KZEdkc3hzV1JqUm84T1JqMHBQUzVjcUhTWncxOVFndWRvRk02UXBlYzl4VkNfQU85NU9WLUM5TklBVFA2QXhaSjhSWmNYUGo4dmlOV2RSNkd1NlkyOXJKT2ZSaW5SZw?oc=5
 
💣 Exploitation of Critical NGINX Vulnerability Begins - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Nginx. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 VCF 9.1 Licensing: Programmatic, Centralized, and Built to Scale
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
The licensing framework for VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.1 continues to evolve, reducing complexity and administrative overhead. Previously, license usage acknowledgment was a recurring manual task — one that had to be performed every 180 days by an administrator with the right access. VCF 9.1 eliminates the manual cycle entirely.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/18/vcf-9-1-licensing-programmatic-centralized-and-built-to-scale/
 
📰 Ivanti, Fortinet, SAP, VMware, n8n Patch RCE, SQL Injection, Privilege Escalation Flaws - The Hacker News
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a VMware, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigAFBVV95cUxOSVY2YThfdWRKVmJQcDNmeWVKTDBnbHFvMl9iZS1LeDFjdEtObVBQeHoxNzZ5ZlVlUWxHTHlZS0RCVlU5VmtEa0ZhYnFiU3E1VWNOSWN4N0ZPTE5icWl4X2hkZnVlemZQNXljYWNUcGVPRkdVOWF2VjQ3ak82MGFSNg?oc=5
 
📰 NGINX: Critical vulnerability used in attacks - SecNews.gr
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Nginx, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMickFVX3lxTE5wTTFhY3BueWI3MldINS1FNm1LbWdUZnMydXdyNDZUcnNucEw2UHJtZ3ZRUE1WekhqbWE5b1dQb0dramRtb19FeTg2ZHBMT2xjTVZWMkJ0OEtJMzJPUlBvaDdpU2h0OUUxZm9mQ0E4UGRuUQ?oc=5
 
📰 Open source tool maker Grafana Labs says hackers stole its code, refuses to pay ransom - The Tech Buzz
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Grafana, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxQM0NGLXVqMTYxVHZpemFPSkRQM3dCU01hd3lWS1FxR2tsR2RmMEEwcHphSl93bC1janV1NWVPUnBfMjNpa2hlUTdRUk9IRFRmR0pRLUFRdUVRanoyaHcyd2VweGgzLW5PU1ZhckpMTlhKcU40UE1zVjdHTE0wZmtONC1MWW5hbUFnaXNWN0Rzb2RTZ3VNdmNWVnl5anZERVdpbUJfWXpSZDdKZWVuSmZxVGRxWXlpSmt3eHc?oc=5
 
📰 Grafana Confirms Breach After Hackers Claim They Stole Data - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Grafana, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Hackers access GitHub, download codebase in Grafana Labs breach - Silicon Republic
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Grafana, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxOWUpCcmU3cHBWd1VacDBtSEJkcW5vbHgxT2pIYUlyTWFaN0YxT0F6blZBU25IZ3hndDBHTV9lek5wQmw0UjVDaHFWT2w2dmplb3RFMFNoQWJZcUY3R2tyQWJCOHZFME1FeVVMSDhvalc2WFFJZG9pVnhNV29PdUducU0xYWRKOEZoX1N4aER3c1h4ZFloMnFqdWNmcldObnRnLThXbmpuWnp0QjRhd0dqaG1yd2hFbVE?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Ivanti, Fortinet, SAP, VMware, n8n Patch RCE, SQL Injection, Privilege Escalation Flaws
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.6
Resumo:
Ivanti, Fortinet, n8n, SAP, and VMware have released security fixes for various vulnerabilities that could be exploited by bad actors to bypass authentication and execute arbitrary code. Topping the list is a critical flaw impacting Ivanti Xtraction (CVE-2026-8043, CVSS score: 9.6) that could be exploited to achieve information disclosure or client-side attacks.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/ivanti-fortinet-sap-vmware-n8n-patch.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-8803 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 3.7
Resumo:
A flaw has been found in opensourcepos Open Source Point of Sale up to 3.4.2. Impacted is the function Login of the file app/Models/Employee.php of the component Employee Login. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The attack is considered to have high complexity. The actual existence of this vulnerability is currently in question. The vendor explains: "[T]he code is still there to allow the upgrade path to...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8803
 
💣 New Windows 'MiniPlasma' zero-day exploit gives SYSTEM access, PoC released
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A cybersecurity researcher has released a proof-of-concept exploit for a Windows privilege escalation zero-day dubbed "MiniPlasma" that lets attackers gain SYSTEM privileges on fully patched Windows systems.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/new-windows-miniplasma-zero-day-exploit-gives-system-access-poc-released/
 
💣 Exploit available for new DirtyDecrypt Linux root escalation flaw
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A recently patched local privilege escalation vulnerability in the Linux kernel's rxgk module now has a proof-of-concept exploit that allows attackers to gain root access on some Linux systems.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/exploit-available-for-new-dirtydecrypt-linux-root-escalation-flaw/
 
💣 Hackers earn $1,298,250 for 47 zero-days at Pwn2Own Berlin 2026
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Pwn2Own Berlin 2026 hacking contest has concluded, with security researchers collecting $1,298,250 in rewards after exploiting 47 zero-day flaws.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-earn-1-298-250-for-47-zero-days-at-pwn2own-berlin-2026/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-8719 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
The AI Engine – The Chatbot, AI Framework & MCP for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Privilege Escalation in version 3.4.9. This is due to missing WordPress capability enforcement in the MCP OAuth bearer-token authorization path, where any valid OAuth token causes MCP access to be granted without verifying administrator privileges. This makes it possible for authenticated (Subscriber+) attackers to inv...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8719
 
🚨 CVE-2018-25324 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.2
Resumo:
Simple Fields 0.2 through 0.3.5 WordPress Plugin contains a local file inclusion vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to read arbitrary files by injecting null bytes into the wp_abspath parameter on PHP versions before 5.3.4. Attackers can supply malicious wp_abspath values to simple_fields.php to include files like /etc/passwd or inject PHP code into Apache logs for remote code execution when allow_ur...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2018-25324
 
📰 Israeli troops begin intercepting vessels from a flotilla trying to breach the Gaza blockade - Rocky Mountain Outlook
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Two cops providing security to polio teams killed in targeted attacks in Bajaur - The Express Tribune
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 17/05/2026 e 18/05/2026.
